title: ‘Spaceballs’ Sequel Set for April 2027 Release Date
content:
ByAngelique Jackson

Amazon MGM Studios has setMel Brooks‘ long-awaited “Spaceballs” sequel to debut next spring.

The sci-fi spoof movie, which marks areturn to actingfor star Rick Moranis, will be released on April 23, 2027, in time for the cult classic’s 40th anniversary.

Moranis will reprise his role in the goofy intergalactic adventure as Lord Dark Helmet alongside Bill Pullman as Lone Starr, Daphne Zuniga as Princess Vespa, and George Wyner as Colonel Sandurz. Brooks, 99, a winner of the coveted EGOT and hailed as one of the greatest comedic filmmakers in Hollywood history, also returns as the Yoga-esque being Yogurt.

Josh Gadheadlines the new cast, which also features Keke Palmer, Anthony Carrigan and Lewis Pullman, Bill’s son. (“Every day was such a trip,” the younger Pullmantold People last year. “It … felt like a bizarre simulation. I just couldn’t believe my luck.”)

Josh Greenbaum, who is known for “Barb and Star Go to Vista Del Mar” and “Will & Harper,” is directing from a script by Gad, Benji Samit and Dan Hernandez. Like the 1987 Brooks-directed original, the sequel is expected to riff on popular sci-fi franchises like “Star Wars,” “Star Trek” and “Alien.”

The sequel was announced last summer in a video shared by Brooks. “Thirty-eight years ago, there was only one ‘Star Wars’ trilogy,” the announcement read. “But since then there have been … a prequel trilogy, a sequel trilogy, a sequel to the prequel, a prequel to the sequel, countless TV spinoffs, a movie spinoff of the TV spinoff, which is both a prequel and a sequel.” The video points out that other franchises like “Jurassic Park, “Avatar” and “Harry Potter” have also continued to expand. “But in 38 years,” it concluded, “There has only ever been one ‘Spaceballs.’ Until now…”

Plot details about the sequel, including its title, are being kept under wraps, but “the title is rumored to be the name of the movie, and plot details are being described as information about what happens in the story,” reads Amazon MGM’s tongue-in-cheek synopsis. A prior logline also teased that the movie is a “non-prequel non-reboot sequel part two but with reboot elements franchise expansion film.”

Imagine Entertainment’s Brian Grazer, Ron Howard and Jeb Brody will also produce alongside Brooks (for his Brooksfilms Limited), Gad (for Angry Child Productions), Greenbaum and Kevin Salter. Adam Merims, Samit and Hernandez will executive produce.

Deadline first reported the dating news.
title_zh: 《太空大戰(Spaceballs)》續集定於2027年4月上映。
content_zh:
由安琪莉克·傑克森(Angelique Jackson)報導

亞馬遜MGM影業(Amazon MGM Studios)已經確定梅爾·布魯克斯(Mel Brooks)期待已久的《太空大戰(Spaceballs)》續集將於明年春季首映。

這部科幻諷刺電影標誌著明星瑞克·莫拉尼斯(Rick Moranis)重返演藝圈，將於2027年4月23日上映，正好趕上這部邪典經典的40週年紀念。

莫拉尼斯將重返他在這部搞笑的星際冒險中的角色黑暗頭盔勳爵(Lord Dark Helmet)，與比爾·普爾曼(Bill Pullman)飾演的孤星(Lone Starr)、達芙妮·祖尼加(Daphne Zuniga)飾演的維斯帕公主(Princess Vespa)以及喬治·懷納(George Wyner)飾演的桑德茲上校(Colonel Sandurz)共同演出。99歲的布魯克斯被譽為好萊塢歷史上最偉大的喜劇導演之一，並且贏得了備受推崇的EGOT獎項，他也將回歸飾演類似瑜伽的角色優格(Yogurt)。

喬什·蓋德(Josh Gad)將領銜新演員陣容，還包括凱基·帕爾默(Keke Palmer)、安東尼·卡里根(Anthony Carrigan)和比爾的兒子路易斯·普爾曼(Lewis Pullman)。（“每一天都像是一場旅行，”年輕的普爾曼去年告訴《人物》雜誌。“這……感覺像是一個奇怪的模擬。我真不敢相信我的運氣。”）

喬什·格林鮑姆(Josh Greenbaum)將執導這部電影，劇本由蓋德、班吉·薩米特(Benji Samit)和丹·埃爾南德斯(Dan Hernandez)共同創作。與1987年布魯克斯執導的原版一樣，續集預計將對《星際大戰(Star Wars)》、《星際迷航(Star Trek)》和《異形(Alien)》等熱門科幻系列進行諷刺。

續集在去年夏天由布魯克斯分享的一段影片中宣布。“三十八年前，只有一部《星際大戰》三部曲，”公告中寫道。“但從那時起，出現了……一部前傳三部曲、一部續集三部曲、一部前傳的續集、一部續集的前傳、無數的電視衍生劇、一部電視衍生劇的電影衍生劇，這同時是前傳也是續集。”影片指出，其他系列如《侏羅紀公園(Jurassic Park)》、《阿凡達(Avatar)》和《哈利·波特(Harry Potter)》也持續擴展。“但在38年裡，”它總結道，“只有一部《太空大戰》。直到現在……”

關於續集的情節細節，包括其標題，仍然保密，但“據傳標題將是電影的名稱，情節細節被描述為有關故事中發生的事情的信息，”亞馬遜MGM的幽默簡介中寫道。之前的簡介也暗示這部電影是一部“非前傳非重啟的續集第二部，但包含重啟元素的系列擴展電影。”

想像娛樂(Imagine Entertainment)的布萊恩·格雷澤(Brian Grazer)、朗·霍華德(Ron Howard)和傑布·布羅迪(Jeb Brody)將與布魯克斯（通過他的布魯克斯影業有限公司(Brooksfilms Limited)）、蓋德（通過憤怒小孩製作公司(Angry Child Productions)）、格林鮑姆和凱文·薩爾特(Kevin Salter)共同製作。亞當·梅里姆斯(Adam Merims)、薩米特和埃爾南德斯將擔任執行製片人。

《Deadline》首次報導了這一上映日期的消息。
summary_zh:
由安琪莉克·傑克森(Angelique Jackson)報導

亞馬遜MGM影業(Amazon MGM Studios)已經確定梅爾·布魯克斯(Mel Brooks)期待已久的《太空大戰(Spaceballs)》續集將於明年春季首映。

這部科幻諷刺電影標誌著明星瑞克·莫拉尼斯(Rick Moranis)重返演藝圈，將於2027年4月23日上映，正好趕上這部邪典經典的40週年紀念。
